meta.description: The draft of the vessel

minimum.description: The minimum draft of the vessel

maximum.description: The maximum draft of the vessel

current.description: The current draft of the vessel

canoe.description: The draft of the vessel without protrusions such as keel, centerboard, rudder

meta.description: The various lengths of the vessel
Data should be of type number.
Data should be of type number.
The ais ship type see http://www.bosunsmate.org/ais/message5.php
Distance of the sensor along the vessel axis from the bow
Distance of the sensor across the vessel from the centreline, positive towards starboard
Sensor class — for an AIS transponder, A or B.
AC equipment common qualities
AC equipment common qualities

Mode of the vessel based on the current conditions. Can be combined with navigation.state to control vessel signals eg switch to night mode for instrumentation and lights, or make sound signals for fog.
Apparent wind speed
Apparent wind angle, negative to port
The wind direction relative to magnetic north
Wind speed over ground (as calculated from speedApparent and vessel's speed over ground)
The wind direction relative to true north.
Direction and strength of current affecting the vessel

drift.description: The speed component of the water current vector

setTrue.description: The direction component of the water current vector referenced to true (geographic) north

setMagnetic.description: The direction component of the water current vector referenced to magnetic north

meta.description: Depth below Transducer
Water temperature.
Mean height of the highest third of waves (combined wind-wave and swell).
Mean wave period.
Mean direction waves come FROM, true north.
Height of locally wind-generated waves, excluding swell.
Height of swell (waves generated by distant weather).
Mean swell period.
Direction swell comes FROM, true north.
The current tide height  relative to lowest astronomical tide (LAT/Chart Datum)
The next low tide height relative to lowest astronomical tide (LAT/Chart Datum)
RFC 3339 (UTC only without local offset) string representing date and time.
Next high tide height  relative to lowest astronomical tide (LAT/Chart Datum)
RFC 3339 (UTC only without local offset) string representing date and time.
Outside air temperature.
Barometric pressure.
Relative humidity.
Dew point.
Current outside theoretical wind chill temperature

Wind chill computed against the apparent wind the moving vessel experiences. Falls back to the theoretical (true-wind) value when vessel-motion data is unavailable; in that case this leaf equals environment.outside.theoreticalWindChillTemperature.
Current outside heat index temperature
Current outside air density
WBGT: composite heat-stress index combining wet bulb, dry bulb, and globe (radiant) temperatures. Source of environment.weather.heatStressIndex.
AccuWeather apparent (feels-like) temperature combining wind and humidity effects across the full thermal range.
Mass of water vapor per cubic meter of air (derived from temperature and relative humidity).
Peak gust wind speed (ground-referenced). Sits under environment.weather.* because the 1.8.2 wind vocabulary does not define a gust leaf.

Multiplier of peak gust over sustained wind speed (gust/sustained), always >= 1. Omitted when the upstream gust reading is not above the sustained wind speed. Plugin-derived; not in the 1.8.2 vocabulary.
Wind force category 0 (calm) to 12 (hurricane), derived from sustained wind speed. Plugin-derived; not in the 1.8.2 vocabulary.

Apparent wind speed calculated from the provider's ground-referenced wind and vessel motion. Plugin-derived; published off the canonical environment.wind leaves so it cannot displace a real anemometer feed.
Apparent wind angle relative to the bow (-pi..pi, negative to port), calculated from the provider's wind and vessel motion. Plugin-derived; published off the canonical environment.wind leaves.
WHO solar UV scale: 0..2 low, 3..5 moderate, 6..7 high, 8..10 very high, 11+ extreme.
Horizontal visibility distance reported by the weather provider.
Fraction of sky covered by clouds: 0 (clear) to 1 (overcast).
Liquid-equivalent precipitation depth accumulated over the past hour.
WBGT-derived heat-stress category on the US military WBGT flag cutoffs: 0 (<26.7 C), 1 (26.7..27.8 C), 2 (27.8..29.4 C), 3 (29.4..32.2 C), 4 (>=32.2 C).
Plain-language summary of current conditions from the weather provider (AccuWeather WeatherText or Open-Meteo WMO weather code).
Refrigerator Temperature
Temperature
Freezer Temperature

zones.message: Freezer is acting as a Refridgerator

meta.description: The position of the vessel in 2 or 3 dimensions (WGS84 datum)
Rate of turn (+ve is change to starboard). If the value is AIS RIGHT or LEFT, set to +-0.0206 rads and add warning in notifications
Vessel speed over ground. If converting from AIS 'HIGH' value, set to 102.2 (Ais max value) and add warning in notifications
Current magnetic heading of the vessel, equals 'headingCompass adjusted for magneticDeviation'
Course over ground (true)
Vessel attitude: roll, pitch and yaw

roll.description: Vessel roll, +ve is list to starboard

yaw.description: Yaw, +ve is heading change to starboard

The magnetic variation (declination) at the current position that must be added to the magnetic heading to derive the true heading. Easterly variations are positive and Westerly variations are negative (in Radians).
Course over ground (magnetic)
Current navigational state of the vessel
The current state of the engine
Engine revolutions (x60 for RPM)
Trim/tilt state, 0<=ratio<=1, 1 is 100% up
